help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Search the FAQ or contact support below.
help.footNote: Fixam Support is available Monday - Saturday, 8 AM - 8 PM WAT.
help.qPostTask: How do I post a task?
help.aPostTask: Tap Create Task from the home screen or menu. Add the title, description, location and budget, then submit it for review.
help.aPayment: Fixam connects clients and providers. Payment is handled after the service according to the agreed terms.
help.aVerified: Professionals complete identity checks with documents and a live selfie. Certificates can improve trust.
help.aCancel: Yes, you can cancel before a professional is assigned. After assignment, contact support if you need help.
help.qCoins: What is the Fixam coin system?
help.aCoins: Fixam credits help providers unlock opportunities and manage job requests.
help.qReport: How do I report an issue?
help.aReport: Open the task or contact support from the Help Center. We will review the issue.
help.qBecomeVerified: How do I become a verified professional?
help.aBecomeVerified: Go to Settings > Verification, upload your document, and complete the selfie step.

invite.title: Invite Friends & Earn Credits
invite.subtitle: Invite a friend and earn 1 credit when they join Fixam using your referral code.
invite.step2: They sign up and verify their account
invite.step3: You receive 1 credit after their signup is confirmed
invite.shareMessage: Join me on Fixam! Use my referral code {{code}} so I earn 1 credit when you sign up. Download here: https://fixam.app/download

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Tell us what to improve or what is not working well.
feedback.sent: Your feedback has been sent to Fixam.
